## Highlights
- $2M/mo onramp volume, 7,400 purchase events/mo, 7x volume growth since early 2025, 93% OTP-to-wallet completion (CoinFlip non-custodial wallet)
- Tech lead: wallet, ATM operations, and rewards services at CoinFlip
- Co-architected JPMorgan CRM platform — PWM Wealth Tech Award 2022

## About
Nicholas Panella is a Staff Full-Stack Engineer based in Tampa, FL. Open to staff / principal platform and full-stack roles. The site includes production metrics, project highlights, experience timeline, education, and an AI assistant grounded in verified professional background — it does not invent credentials.

## Education
- Bloomsburg University of Pennsylvania, B.S.B.A. in Information and Technology Management, Dec 2016
